success_target: Customer fully onboarded in <60 minutes (automated path)

onboarding_tracks.description: Fully automated onboarding for Free tier accounts

steps.name: Account creation
steps.action: Email + password or Google/GitHub OAuth

steps.name: Email verification
steps.action: One-click email link

steps.name: Profile completion
steps.action: Organization name, sector, role

steps.name: Free tier activated
steps.action: Dashboard access granted immediately

steps.name: Welcome email sent
steps.action: Getting started guide + video walkthrough link

steps.name: In-app checklist displayed
steps.action: 5-item onboarding checklist shown in dashboard

steps.name: First advisory reviewed
steps.action: Customer views first threat advisory

steps.name: Upgrade CTA triggered
steps.action: Contextual upgrade prompt shown on Pro feature access

onboarding_tracks.description: Primarily automated onboarding with documentation support for Pro tier

steps.name: Pro upgrade completed
steps.action: Credit card → plan activated immediately

steps.name: API key provisioned
steps.action: API key generated and displayed in dashboard

steps.name: Welcome to Pro email
steps.action: Pro-specific getting started guide

steps.name: API authentication tested
steps.action: JWT token obtained. Quickstart guide linked.

steps.name: First API call made
steps.action: GET /api/v1/intel/latest.json returns advisories

steps.name: Webhook configured
steps.action: Webhook URL registered. Test delivery confirmed.

steps.name: First advisory in SIEM
steps.action: Integration guide followed. Advisory visible in SIEM.

steps.name: Detection rules downloaded
steps.action: Sigma pack downloaded. 5 rules imported to SIEM.

steps.name: Onboarding checklist complete
steps.action: Health score initialized. Day 7 check-in email scheduled.

onboarding_tracks.description: CSM-guided onboarding with SE support for Enterprise tier

steps.name: Contract signed
steps.action: DocuSign executed. AE hands off to CSM.

steps.name: Account provisioned
steps.action: Enterprise tenant created. 25 seats activated. API key generated.

steps.name: CSM assignment
steps.action: Named CSM assigned within 1 hour of contract signing

steps.name: Kickoff call scheduled
steps.action: 60-minute kickoff within 24h. Calendar invite sent.

steps.name: Kickoff call completed
steps.action: Success plan agreed. Integration timeline set. Slack channel created.

steps.name: API key delivered securely
steps.action: Enterprise API key in customer portal. 2000 req/min active.

steps.name: SIEM integration session
steps.action: SE joins call. SIEM connector configured. Webhook tested.

steps.name: First advisory in SIEM confirmed
steps.action: Customer confirms SIEM receiving APEX advisories.

steps.name: Detection rules deployed
steps.action: ≥10 Sigma/KQL/SPL rules deployed in production SIEM.

steps.name: ATT&CK baseline established
steps.action: Coverage heatmap reviewed. Baseline gap report generated.

steps.name: User invitations sent
steps.action: ≥3 analysts invited. Roles assigned (Admin, Analyst, Read-Only).

steps.name: Day 14 review scheduled
steps.action: 2-week check-in calendar invite sent.

steps.name: Onboarding complete
steps.action: Health score initialized. Monthly cadence activated.

steps.name: MSSP contract executed + console access
steps.action: MSSP console provisioned. Partner Success Manager assigned.

steps.name: Partner training (2h)
steps.action: Console walkthrough. Tenant provisioning. API architecture. White-label config.

steps.name: 3 demo tenants provisioned
steps.action: Financial, Healthcare, Industrial demo tenants created. Intelligence validated.

steps.name: White-label configuration
steps.action: Logo, brand color, company name configured. Report template verified.

steps.name: MSSP own SIEM integration
steps.action: Partner's internal SIEM connected to APEX. Multi-tenant webhook routing tested.

steps.name: First production client tenant
steps.action: First real client tenant provisioned. Intelligence delivery verified. SLA tracking active.

steps.name: MSSP go-live
steps.action: Go-live confirmed. Weekly sync cadence initiated. Partner listed in APEX directory.

onboarding_checklist_items.item: Webhook configured and test delivery confirmed
